claims.summary: High-entropy semantic persistence may contribute to viscous or muddy texture.
claims.disposition: Verified entropy persistence is separately measurable and routed a same-fill high/low-entropy copied-fixture comparison without changing admission.

claims.summary: Shadow influence may linger out of sync with attractor pulses.
claims.disposition: Verified equal default decay ticks but different durations; routed a bounded timing trace rather than inferring a phantom effect.

claims.summary: Semantic stale behavior may contain abrupt threshold changes.
claims.disposition: Verified continuous sigmoid and hysteretic handovers; eighteen focused no-cliff and entropy tests passed.

claims.summary: Shadow decay should couple to pressure and its amplitude ceiling should rise.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because both changes alter live sensory influence and regulation.
